rows.label: qev031101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hey, Earthling... You're a BLADE, right?
I have a favor to ask you... But before
that, there's one thing I need to ask.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Are you someone who values trees? Do
you feel the life flowing within them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev031101_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say that nature must
be treated with care.

rows.label: qev031101_JNK0020
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev031101_SEL0021
rows.name:
State that trees are nothing
more than mere resources.

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Those words... They don't seem
to be a lie. I will trust you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0004
rows.name: ...Then disappear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0005
rows.name:
I cannot entrust a single fragment of
hope... that I protected by putting my
life on the line, to someone like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0006
rows.name:
I am the protector of the Great
Tree, Naza Tenikamonkey...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0007
rows.name:
I want you to help me nurture a
Great Tree from this single seed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Can I give you the details
after you accept the request?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0009
rows.name:
It's the seed of the Great Tree I've
protected with my life. I can't carelessly
leak the story and expose it to danger...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Phew... I'm glad I called out to you. There
are some good-for-nothings among Earthlings,
too, so it was an all-or-nothing gamble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_JNK0030
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev031101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Naza what happened to her.

rows.label: qev031101_JNK0040
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev031101_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask for details regarding
the Great Tree.

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0011
rows.name:
I've faced danger over and over to protect
this seed from those Growth bastards.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0012
rows.name:
...But that doesn't matter. As long
as I can protect the Great Tree, I
don't care what happens to my body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0013
rows.name:
That's why, when the Growth attacked
our homeland and burned the trees
housing the Great One...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0014
rows.name:
I embedded this single seed inside my
body and survived to this very day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0015
rows.name:
It was all to let the lost Great
Tree take root in a new land...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0016
rows.name:
All that's left is to plant this
seed in the earth here, and my
mission will be fulfilled...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0017
rows.name:
The Great Tree houses the Great
One, and the Great One protects
the Tree Clan of that settlement.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0018
rows.name:
That's why we carefully,
carefully nurture the Great
Tree in each of our settlements.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0019
rows.name:
...But those Growth bastards
thoroughly burned the Great
Trees to destroy our foundation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0020
rows.name:
The tree protectors who defied them were massacred. In
the end, even our comrades began burning the trees
themselves, deciding their own lives were more important...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0021
rows.name:
That's why I embedded this single seed
inside my body and slipped past their
eyes to survive and make it here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0022
rows.name:
It was a long journey to reach this place, but...
All that's left is to plant this seed in the earth
here, and my mission will be fulfilled...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0023
rows.name:
However, things are different from our homeland,
and I'm worried if it'll grow properly... I
want to borrow the wisdom of other aliens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0024
rows.name:
So first, I want you to find an alien
who is knowledgeable about trees and
ask them how to grow trees on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_JNK0050
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev031101_SEL0051
rows.name: Promise to handle everything.

rows.label: qev031101_JNK0060
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev031101_SEL0061
rows.name:
Ask about any aliens who might
be knowledgeable about trees.

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0025
rows.name:
Thank you. There might even be some Bias
who have forgotten about this, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0026
rows.name:
In order for us to survive, the
protection of the Great One residing
in the trees is absolutely necessary.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0027
rows.name:
Even Earthlings wouldn't be able to keep
going when push comes to shove without a
final foundation to rely on, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0028
rows.name:
I've heard that those guys called
Ma-non and Orpheans have outstanding
scientific capabilities, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0029
rows.name:
Sorry, I don't really know the details either.
It would be best if there was someone like a
botanist... Well, just try searching around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0030
rows.name:
I'm counting on you. The fate of the
Bias rests on this single seed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Please ask a smart alien about
how to grow trees on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0032
rows.name:
...Also, if there's a surefire method
to grow the Great Tree, I want you to
fetch whatever is needed for it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0033
rows.name:
I only have one seed... I
absolutely cannot afford to fail.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0034
rows.name:
I also heard how to grow trees from
this Sensei. I just need something
called Deformed Tree Nectar, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0035
rows.name:
Hey, I'm counting on you.
Head to the Divine Roost and
fetch that for me, alright?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0036
rows.name:
This Orphean Sensei taught me all sorts of things.
It seems the Great Tree will grow big in no time
as long as we have Deformed Tree Nectar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0037
rows.name:
...Hey, you don't happen to
have any on you, do you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0038
rows.name:
Hmm... Will something
like this really work?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0039
rows.name:
It will succeed with a 99.86%
probability. The chance of the nectar
being ineffective is extremely low.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0040
rows.name:
He says some complicated things, but
he doesn't seem to be a bad person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0041
rows.name:
...Hey, do you think I should
trust what this Sensei is saying?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_JNK0070
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev031101_SEL0071
rows.name: Say that Monboiton is trustworthy.

rows.label: qev031101_JNK0080
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev031101_SEL0081
rows.name: Say that Monboiton seems suspicious.

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0042
rows.name:
Yeah, you're right. He's been caring about this
like it's his own problem from the start.
There's no way a Sensei like this would lie.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0043
rows.name:
...Alright! Then let's use this right
away to try and grow the Great Tree![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0044
rows.name:
I see... Well, if the seed ends
up ruined because of this guy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0045
rows.name:
I'll just beat this Sensei until
he can't stand up anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0046
rows.name:
The probability of that is zero.
Therefore, such a threat is meaningless.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0047
rows.name:
...Alright, got it! Let's use this
to try and grow the Great Tree![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0048
rows.name: Is this good, Sensei?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0049
rows.name:
Yes, there are no problems. If we wait a
short while, it will sprout right up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0050
rows.name:
Amazing! It really is sprouting!
At this rate, it'll be a Great
Tree by tomorrow...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0051
rows.name:
The Great One will be
resurrected here in NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0052
rows.name:
Hmm, this is quite a peculiar tree. Well
then, let us partake of it at once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0053
rows.name: ...What!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0054
rows.name:
As expected, a freshly sprouted tree
is wonderfully crisp and fresh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev031101_SEL0091
rows.name: Nod in agreement.

rows.label: qev031101_JNK0100
rows.name: Suggestion

rows.label: qev031101_SEL0101
rows.name:
Suggest that he should
probably apologize.

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0056
rows.name:
Yes, thank you for the meal. It was a
Great Tree with quite a bizarre flavor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0057
rows.name:
Pardon? That is a word used to show
remorse, yes? I do not understand the
meaning of using it at this timing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0058
rows.name:
Hey, YOU!! What the hell are you doing?!
Why did you eat the Great Tree?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0059
rows.name:
Plants exist in order to be eaten.
There is no other meaning to them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0060
rows.name:
...Pardon? Why are you so angry...
Were you hungry as well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0061
rows.name: Guh! Gwaaaargh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0062
rows.name:
...In other words, you believe that
something defined as a god resides
within that tree from earlier, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0063
rows.name:
However, that is a nonsensical idea, you see?
Listen closely. As a botanist, I have continuously
investigated various trees up until now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0064
rows.name:
Yet, not once has anything like
a god ever been discovered
within them. That is a fact.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0065
rows.name:
...I see, I understand. Among us Tree
Clan, there's a legend that on the verge
of death, we can meet the Great One.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0066
rows.name:
Since there's no meaning in me living anymore
anyway, I'll kill you, and I'll die too. Let's
conduct that... investigation of yours, shall we?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0067
rows.name:
Ah... My Ovah is clamoring that
it is not yet time to die.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0068
rows.name:
...You there, Earthling. Don't you
think you should stop the tragedy
that is about to occur right now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_JNK0110
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev031101_SEL0111
rows.name:
Carefully explain the mistake Monboiton
made and urge him to reflect on it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_JNK0120
rows.name: Persuade

rows.label: qev031101_SEL0121
rows.name:
Tell the enraged Naza that
you should talk things out.

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0069
rows.name:
...I see. Your explanation
is very easy to understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0070
rows.name:
So her treating that tree as
sacred is... similar to the
feelings we hold towards our Ovah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0071
rows.name:
But he ate it! The final... Great
Tree that we've passed down from
generation to generation![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0072
rows.name:
There's no room for talking! There's
no way I can ever forgive him![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0073
rows.name:
Passed down from generation to
generation...? Could it be that this
is something similar to our Ovah?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0074
rows.name: I see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0075
rows.name:
I have done something terrible... I
have finally grasped the situation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0076
rows.name:
...I apologize most deeply. I will
regenerate your tree for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0077
rows.name: Wh... You can do that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0078
rows.name:
Yes, for that is my profession. By partaking of it
earlier, I was able to analyze its components. As long
as I have the materials, it will be a simple task.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0079
rows.name:
Zeze Plantain and a
Branch of Longevity...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0080
rows.name:
If you retrieve these for me, I
will regenerate your Great Tree
here with a 99.12% probability.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0081
rows.name:
Zeze Plantain and a Branch of
Longevity... Fetch those for me, okay...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0082
rows.name:
If he says he can fix it, I'll test it out.
If it doesn't go back to normal, I'll go
with him on that... investigation of his.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0083
rows.name:
There was an Orphean staring at
us intently just a while ago.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0084
rows.name:
It seems he's still wandering
around this area, but... I've got
a really bad feeling about this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031101_MSG0085
rows.name:
This feeling... It might be a
message from the Great One.[ST:wait ]
